text: Ọmọ tó bá mọ́ ọwọ́ ẹ̀yìn, á jẹun pẹ̀lú àgbà.
explanation: A child who knows how to wash their hands will eat with elders.

text: Bi a bá péjọ, a máa rí ohun tí a ó jẹ.
explanation: When people gather, they will find something to eat.

text: Àìmọ̀kan ló ń jẹ́ kí a máa ṣe aṣiṣe.
explanation: Ignorance is what makes us keep making mistakes.

text: Agbára ọ̀wọ́ kì í tó ìmọ̀ ọpọlọ.
explanation: The strength of the hand cannot surpass the wisdom of the mind.

text: Ẹni tí ó bá ní ìwà, ó ní ọlá.
explanation: He who has good character has honor.

text: Ọ̀rọ̀ tó bá lọ́wọ́ àgbà, kì í ṣeré.
explanation: Words spoken by elders are not to be taken lightly.

text: Ẹni tí ó bá ní sùúrù, yóò rí ìyì.
explanation: The patient person will eventually gain respect.

text: Àjò kò gbé ẹnikan lórí, àjò ni gbogbo wa.
explanation: No one owns a journey; we are all travelers together.

text: Ọ̀pọ̀lọ̀ tó ní ìmọ̀, kì í ṣeré ní omi.
explanation: The frog that has wisdom does not play carelessly in water.

text: Ẹni tí ó bá níi ìbáṣepọ̀ rere, yóò rí ìrànlọ́wọ́.
explanation: He who maintains good relationships will always find help.
